title: New-Skills
description: The "New-skills" mod adds four new skills: Digging, Battle, Global improvements and Organism.
body:
This mod adds four new skills that can be upgraded, namely: mining, combat, organism and global improvements. When leveling up Combat and Loot, various tools for the game will be unlocked; when leveling up global improvements, new abilities will be added to the player.

And if you pump up your body, you can get +1 heart or speed up your attack speed. To upgrade Global Improvements and your body, you need to craft a tablet or laptop. To upgrade Combat and Loot, you need “Improvement Points”, and for global improvements, “Global Improvement Points”, to obtain them you need to interact with the game world.

Command to issue Upgrade Points or Global Upgrade Points "//skills"

In order to open the improvements window, you need to press “K” or on a tablet or laptop.
